title: Unit, Integration, CLI, Fixture, and Changed-Case Testing · Code Recall
summary: A delayed maintenance review reconstructs unit, integration, cli, fixture, and changed-case testing from repository state, input bytes, decoded text, tokens, counters, ranking keys, report records, stdout, stderr, exit status, tests, package artifact, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for risk-layered Bookbot test suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Partition tests across pure units, file integration, CLI behavior, report snapshots, package installation, and stakeholder acceptance.
Use named table and subtest cases for empty, punctuation, Unicode, malformed, large, tied, and boundary inputs.
Use real temporary files and directories for filesystem contracts and reserve mocks for narrow failure injection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Test Partitions · changed case · Review Test Partitions
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Bookbot team handles case 3966 during a digital-humanities corpus revision. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer unit, real-file integration, CLI, changed-defect, and installed smoke evidence; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of host file, process, Git, package-install, credential, and release effects; then install the built wheel in a fresh environment and rerun success, invalid-argument, and decode-failure cases. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Test Quality, keep Test Quality connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prove tests fail under a deliberate changed behavior and protect against order, locale, encoding, platform, and stale-fixture coupling.

hints: For Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Test Quality, name the stakeholder, corpus authority, revision, path, bytes, encoding, Unicode, token, count, rank, report, command, test, package, release, and transfer boundary, Test Quality precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Test Quality, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, normalization, tokenization, counting, ranking, formatting, stdout, stderr, status, test, package, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review Bookbot team handles case 6440 during a large-file migration rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer unit, real-file integration, CLI, changed-defect, and installed smoke evidence; retain source permission, digest purpose, revision, Python, Unicode, policy, command, and output identity; then move the input through a symlink outside the allowed root and reject it without reading content. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Prove tests fail under a deliberate changed behavior and protect against order, locale, encoding, platform, and stale-fixture coupling.
